title: pomaderris apetala subsp. maritima
intro: Pomaderris apetala subsp. maritima, a subspecies of the Pomaderris apetala plant, is a shrub native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including relief from fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as a reduction in inflammation. Pomaderris apetala subsp. maritima can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
